hero.title: Ready to Take Your Business to the Next Level?
hero.description: At NeXora, we design intelligent solutions tailored to your business to help you grow, automate, and achieve real results.
services.title: Projects That Drive Your Business Forward.
services.description: We develop custom digital solutions to optimize processes, improve your clients' experience, and accelerate your company's growth.
services.crm.description: We implement and customize CRM solutions to manage your clients, sales, and processes in one place — improving relationships and results.
services.web.title: Web Pages
services.web.description: We create modern, fast, SEO-optimized websites that represent your brand, attract new clients, and build lasting trust.
services.apps.description: We design and develop mobile applications that deliver incredible experiences, increase engagement, and scale your business.
services.automations.title: Automations
services.automations.description: We automate repetitive tasks and integrate your tools and technology to save time, reduce errors, and increase productivity.
process.title: Up and running in 3 simple steps.
process.description: No lengthy contracts. No confusing tech talk. We handle everything — you focus on running your business.
process.step_1.title: We learn about your business
process.step_1.description: One free strategy call — no pressure, no pitch deck. Tell us your goals, your challenges, and what's holding you back. We'll map out exactly what it takes to move forward.
process.step_2.title: We build your solution
process.step_2.description: We design and build your custom solution — whether that's a website, CRM, mobile app, automation system, or AI tools — combining strategy, design, and technology to get results.
process.step_3.title: Watch your business grow
process.step_3.description: More leads. More efficiency. More revenue. Your new digital infrastructure works for you around the clock — and we stay in your corner for ongoing support and growth.
ai.title: Smart Technology That Works For You.
ai.description: We design and implement intelligent solutions that automate, optimize, and scale your business.
ai.tagline: Innovate · Automate · Grow · The future is intelligent
ai.agents.title: AI Agents
ai.agents.description: Intelligent agents that understand, decide, and act for your business — automating tasks, making decisions, and improving continuously.
ai.chatbots.description: Smart conversations that connect with your customers 24/7 — solving doubts, qualifying leads, and improving their experience.
ai.assistants.title: Virtual Assistants
ai.assistants.description: AI-powered assistants that support your team and customers — managing tasks and providing fast, accurate information.
ai.smart_automations.title: Smart Automations
ai.smart_automations.description: We automate repetitive processes with AI so you can save time, reduce errors, and focus on what really matters.
reviews.title: Businesses winning with NeXora.
reviews.description: Real business owners — more leads, more efficiency, more revenue.
reviews.rating_post: by every client we've worked with
pricing.title: No surprises. Just results.
pricing.description: One setup fee. One low monthly. No contracts — cancel anytime. Pick the plan that fits where you are right now.
pricing.note: Not sure which plan is right? Let's talk — we'll point you in the right direction at no cost.
pricing.found.summary: Get found online. Look professional. Get the call.
pricing.found.feature_1: Professional 5-page website built for your specific trade
pricing.found.feature_2: Shows up on Google searches — on-page SEO included
pricing.found.feature_3: Contact form that texts you instantly when someone fills it out
pricing.found.feature_4: WhatsApp + call button front and center on every page
pricing.found.feature_5: Photo gallery to show your work and build trust
pricing.found.feature_6: Google Maps so customers know exactly where you serve
pricing.found.feature_7: Works perfectly on any phone — most of your customers are on mobile
pricing.found.feature_8: Hosting fully managed — we handle everything, no tech headaches
pricing.found.feature_9: Unlimited edits for 90 days after launch
pricing.booked.summary: Stop losing leads to competitors. Get instant replies working for you 24/7.
pricing.booked.feature_2: Instant auto-reply via SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook, or Instagram — even at 2am
pricing.booked.feature_3: Automated review requests sent after every completed job
pricing.booked.feature_4: Simple lead inbox — every lead and message in one place
pricing.booked.feature_5: Follow-up sequences that automatically chase leads
pricing.booked.feature_6: Monthly performance snapshot — calls, leads, reviews
pricing.dominant.summary: The complete growth machine. Run your entire business from your phone.
pricing.dominant.feature_2: Online booking system — customers book directly from your site
pricing.dominant.feature_3: Google Calendar sync — your schedule stays up to date automatically
pricing.dominant.feature_4: Automated estimate and quote delivery by text in seconds
pricing.dominant.feature_5: Appointment reminders that cut no-shows dramatically
pricing.dominant.feature_6: Priority support — direct access, fast response
about.title: Technology that drives your business forward — while you focus on what you do best.
about.paragraph_1: Running a business means juggling growth, operations, and customer experience. Without the right digital foundation, opportunities slip through the cracks.
about.paragraph_2: We make it simple. We build custom digital solutions — from powerful websites to CRM systems, mobile apps, and AI automation — that work together to grow your business with less effort.
about.pillar_ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
about.pillar_ai.subtitle: Tools that think and act for you
about.pillar_strategy.title: Strategy & Results
about.pillar_strategy.subtitle: Data-driven decisions that win
about.pillar_automation.title: Automation & Efficiency
about.pillar_automation.subtitle: Less manual work, more output
about.pillar_support.title: Personalized Support
about.pillar_support.subtitle: With you at every step

cta.description: Contact us and discover how NeXora can design an intelligent solution tailored specifically for your business — from strategy to launch.
cta.tagline: Big ideas. Intelligent solutions. Real results.

contact.fit_1: Businesses ready to modernize their operations and grow faster
contact.fit_2: Owners looking to automate, save time, and reduce manual work

footer.tagline: Big ideas. Intelligent solutions. Real results.
footer.description: We build custom digital solutions for businesses in Central Florida — websites, CRM systems, mobile apps, automations, and AI tools that drive real growth.
footer.closing: We innovate. We optimize. We transform.
